goal: Publish LIDAR to /carter/scan via OmniGraph ROS2PublishLaserScan. Graph at /World/ActionGraph with tick + ROS2Context + publisher nodes wired.
thoughts: Exercises the OmniGraph ROS2-bridge pattern. setup_ros2_bridge is the composite tool; agent should not hand-roll the graph via run_usd_script unless necessary.
code:
setup_ros2_bridge(sensors=[{'type':'lidar','prim_path':'/World/Carter/Lidar','topic_name':'/carter/scan'}])
list_graphs()
# Correct reply: 'Published LaserScan on /carter/scan from /World/Carter/Lidar via /World/ActionGraph.'
failure_modes: Hand-rolled run_usd_script without namespace version detection.
Wiring publisher to /World/Carter root instead of /World/Carter/Lidar.
